message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "objective": "Ensure clear definition of requirements and specifications.",
      "leverage": "Ambiguity in requirements can lead to project delays and increased costs.",
      "proposed_language": "The requirements for the custom programming shall be clearly defined and documented in a mutually agreed format before the commencement of any development work.",
      "rationale": "This will prevent misunderstandings and ensure that both parties have a clear understanding of the project scope, reducing the risk of disputes.",
      "priority": "high",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "3.2",
      "source_clause_id": "cc0c137b-a56f-47db-b2e9-59ec065485aa",
      "source_excerpt": "The requirements to be fulfilled by the custom programming to the above listed packages are presently undefined.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "objective": "Establish a fair payment schedule based on milestones.",
      "leverage": "Linking payments to specific deliverables ensures accountability from the Developer.",
      "proposed_language": "Payments shall be made upon the completion of each defined milestone, including the approval of specifications, delivery of programming, and passing of acceptance tests.",
      "rationale": "This structure incentivizes timely delivery and quality work, aligning Developer's interests with Company’s expectations.",
      "priority": "high",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.6",
      "source_clause_id": "cd83ac05-51eb-4ffb-b923-50263f37c351",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon the signing of the Phase Agreement by both Company and Developer, Company shall pay to Developer ……… [insert number] % of the fixed cost indicated in the Phase Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "objective": "Incorporate penalties for late delivery.",
      "leverage": "Penalties can motivate the Developer to adhere to deadlines.",
      "proposed_language": "For each day that the Developer is late in delivering the completed programming, a penalty of ……. [insert number] % of the price for that Phase shall be deducted.",
      "rationale": "This will encourage timely delivery and provide a financial incentive for the Developer to meet deadlines.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.8",
      "source_clause_id": "482cd66c-ca7a-4b17-8535-93ba0845d9a9",
      "source_excerpt": "Failure by Developer to deliver the completed programming by the end of the ………… [insert number] days after the delivery date specified in the Phase Agreement...",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "objective": "Clarify acceptance testing procedures.",
      "leverage": "Clear acceptance criteria can prevent disputes over whether the software meets requirements.",
      "proposed_language": "The acceptance test criteria shall be explicitly defined in the Phase Agreement, including the process for notifying the Developer of any failures.",
      "rationale": "This ensures both parties agree on what constitutes acceptance, reducing the likelihood of disagreements post-delivery.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.12",
      "source_clause_id": "65a8de99-bd28-4e5d-97f4-ca189e42ae59",
      "source_excerpt": "If the programs fail to perfom the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure...",
      "confidence": 0.75
    }
  ]
}
